name: get_interfaces
description: Retrieve interface status, admin/oper state, MTU, port speed, and traffic counters for a SONiC switch. Source: RESTCONF openconfig-interfaces.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name.description: Optional interface name filter (exact match, e.g. 'Ethernet0').

name: get_ip_interfaces
description: List IPv4 and IPv6 address assignments per interface/subinterface for a SONiC switch. Source: RESTCONF openconfig-interfaces subinterfaces.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_routes
description: Retrieve the IPv4 routing table (with nexthops, protocol, distance, metric, uptime) from FRR via 'vtysh show ip route json' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

vrf.description: Optional VRF name. When omitted, the default VRF is queried.

name: get_ipv6_routes
description: Retrieve the IPv6 routing table (with nexthops, protocol, distance, metric, uptime) from FRR via 'vtysh show ipv6 route json' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

vrf.description: Optional VRF name. When omitted, the default VRF is queried.

name: get_bgp_summary
description: Retrieve BGP IPv4 and IPv6 peer summary (peer state, uptime, prefixes rcvd/sent, msg counts) from FRR via 'vtysh show ip bgp summary json' + 'show bgp ipv6 summary json' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

vrf.description: Optional VRF name. Defaults to the default VRF.

include_ipv6.description: Include IPv6 peer summary. Defaults to true.

name: get_lldp_neighbors
description: Retrieve LLDP neighbors, local advertisement, and per-interface TX/RX statistics. Combines RESTCONF openconfig-lldp (primary) with lldpcli JSON over SSH (fallback + diagnostics). On SONiC VS, neighbor reception is known to be unreliable — the tool reports that explicitly when TX>0 and RX=0.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_vlans
description: List configured VLANs with IP assignment, member ports, and port-tagging mode. Source: 'show vlan brief' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_arp_table
description: Retrieve the ARP/IPv4-neighbor table with IP, MAC, interface, and VLAN. Source: 'show arp' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_portchannels
description: List configured port-channels (LAGs) with their protocol and member ports. Source: 'show interfaces portchannel' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_platform_detail
description: Combined platform health: summary + fans + temperatures + PSUs. Sources: 'show platform summary/fan/temperature/psustatus' over SSH. On SONiC VS, hardware sensors are absent; the tool reports that explicitly.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_sflow_status
description: Retrieve sFlow sampling configuration and status: global enabled flag, sample size, polling interval, collectors, and per-interface sampling. Source: RESTCONF openconfig-sampling-sflow.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_system_info
description: Retrieve SONiC build, kernel, platform, HwSKU, ASIC, serial, and uptime details via 'show version' over SSH.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_system_info_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_system_info. Invokes get_system_info against every inventory device (or the provided list) in parallel and returns a merged envelope with per-switch results and ok/error counts.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs to target. When omitted, fans out to every device in the server's inventory.

name: get_interfaces_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_interfaces. Fans out get_interfaces across every inventory device (or the provided list) in parallel, returning a merged envelope with per-switch results and ok/error counts.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs to target. When omitted, fans out to every device in the server's inventory.

name.description: Optional interface name filter (applied on each switch, exact match).

name: get_bgp_summary_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_bgp_summary. Fabric-wide BGP peer state — which switches have sessions Established, how many peers, routes exchanged — all from one call.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

vrf.description: Optional VRF name (applied on each switch).

include_ipv6.description: Include IPv6 peer summary. Defaults to true.

name: get_routes_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_routes. IPv4 routing tables from every switch in one call — useful for 'who reaches what' diagnosis.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

name: get_lldp_neighbors_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_lldp_neighbors. Fabric-wide LLDP topology — on real hardware, this is the 'who is connected to whom' view. On SONiC VS, every switch will show RX=0 (documented limitation).

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

name: get_vlans_all
description: Parallel multi-device variant of get_vlans. VLAN configuration across every switch — useful for L2 consistency checks.

switch_ips.description: Optional list of management IPs. Defaults to every inventory device.

name: set_interface_admin_status
description: Bring a single interface administratively up or down on a SONiC switch. Reads pre-state via RESTCONF, runs 'sudo config interface startup|shutdown <iface>' via SSH, waits for SWSS to reprogram, then reads post-state. Mutation is recorded in the server-side mutation ledger.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: set_interface_mtu
description: Change the MTU (bytes) of a single interface on a SONiC switch. Reads pre-state via RESTCONF, runs 'sudo config interface mtu <iface> <mtu>' over SSH, waits for SWSS to reprogram, then reads post-state. MTU range 68..9216. Mutation recorded in the ledger.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: set_interface_description
description: Set (or clear) the description/alias on a single SONiC interface. Cosmetic only — no forwarding or control-plane impact. Writes directly to CONFIG_DB via sonic-db-cli because SONiC master removed 'config interface description' from the CLI. Input is strictly sanitised (alphanumerics + safe punctuation only, no quotes/backslashes).

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

description.description: New description (<= 256 chars, safe punctuation only). Pass an empty string to clear.

name: clear_interface_counters
description: Reset interface traffic counters (in/out pkts, errors, discards) via 'sonic-clear counters' over SSH. Resets every Ethernet interface at once on this SONiC build — no per-interface argument is supported. Zero impact on forwarding; common troubleshooting step.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: add_vlan
description: Create a VLAN (1..4094) on a SONiC switch via 'sudo config vlan add <vid>'. Pre/post existence is verified via sonic-db-cli against CONFIG_DB. Mutation is recorded in the ledger.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: remove_vlan
description: Delete a VLAN on a SONiC switch via 'sudo config vlan del <vid>'. SONiC refuses to remove a VLAN that still has attached L3 interfaces or members — the tool surfaces that as an error rather than forcing.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: config_save
description: Persist the current SONiC CONFIG_DB to /etc/sonic/config_db.json via 'sudo config save -y'. Safe — no network impact — but classified MUTATION because it changes on-disk state. Use this after any config change to make it survive reboot.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_mutation_history
description: Return recent entries from the server-side mutation ledger. Read-only view of every MUTATION or DESTRUCTIVE tool invocation: timestamp, tool, switch, inputs (with secrets redacted), pre/post state, status.

limit.description: How many most-recent entries to return. 1..500. Default 50.

switch_ip.description: Optional: filter to entries against this switch.

tool.description: Optional: filter to entries for this tool name.

name: run_show_command
description: Safe escape hatch — run an arbitrary SONiC 'show …' command via SSH. Strictly validated: must start with 'show ', only alphanumerics and a small set of safe punctuation allowed, no shell metacharacters, no quotes, 256-char limit. Prefer dedicated tools when available.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

command.description: SONiC show command, e.g. 'show platform summary' or 'show vlan brief'.

name: set_ip_interface
description: Add or remove an IPv4 address on a SONiC interface (e.g. Ethernet0, PortChannel10, Loopback0, Vlan100). Runs 'sudo config interface ip add|remove <intf> <addr>/<plen>' via SSH; pre/post state read via RESTCONF openconfig-if-ip. Requires explicit confirmation — L3 changes can blackhole traffic.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

interface.description: Target interface name — Ethernet0, PortChannel10, Vlan100, Loopback0, …

address.description: IPv4 address with prefix length, e.g. '10.1.1.1/24'.

name: add_static_route
description: Install an IPv4 static route in FRR's default VRF (vtysh 'ip route <prefix> <nexthop> [distance]'). Pre/post state verified with 'vtysh show ip route <prefix> json'. Requires explicit confirmation.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: remove_static_route
description: Withdraw an IPv4 static route in FRR's default VRF (vtysh 'no ip route <prefix> [nexthop]'). Pre/post state verified with 'vtysh show ip route <prefix> json'. Requires explicit confirmation.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

nexthop.description: Optional next-hop to disambiguate (matches on prefix alone if omitted).

name: set_bgp_neighbor_admin
description: Shut or unshut a single BGP neighbor in FRR (vtysh 'router bgp <asn>' + 'neighbor <ip> shutdown' / 'no neighbor <ip> shutdown'). The local ASN is discovered automatically from 'show ip bgp summary'. Pre/post verified via 'show ip bgp neighbor <ip> json'. Requires explicit confirmation.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: set_portchannel_member
description: Add or remove an Ethernet interface as a member of a PortChannel (LAG) via 'sudo config portchannel member add|del <po> <eth>'. Pre/post state read from CONFIG_DB PORTCHANNEL_MEMBER keys. Requires explicit confirmation.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_fabric_topology
description: Discover the inter-switch fabric by fanning out get_system_info + get_ip_interfaces + get_bgp_summary (+ optionally get_lldp_neighbors) across the whole inventory and correlating the results. Returns nodes + edges ready for a graph render: BGP adjacencies (with matched target mgmt IP + interface) and LLDP neighbours (where RX works).

switch_ips.description: Optional: limit the fabric view to these switch IPs. Default = full inventory.

include_lldp.description: Include LLDP edges (adds a second SSH round-trip per switch). Default true.

name: get_fabric_health
description: Run get_fabric_topology and classify every BGP edge as healthy (session established), broken (both ends in inventory, session not established), or orphan (peer IP not in any inventory switch). Returns an actionable summary + the full topology under 'topology'.

switch_ips.description: Optional: limit the fabric view to these switch IPs.

include_lldp.description: Include LLDP edges in the returned topology. Default true.

name: ping_between
description: ICMP reachability test: SSH into source_switch_ip and run 'ping -c <count> -W <timeout> [-I <source_if>] <target>'. Parses the summary line + RTT for a structured result. SAFE_READ — no device state changes, just ICMP.

source_switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch that will SEND the pings (required).

switch_ip.description: Alias for source_switch_ip (so the NL router can auto-fill from global selection).

target.description: Destination IPv4/IPv6 address or DNS hostname.

count.description: Number of ICMP echo requests (default 3, range 1..10).

timeout_s.description: Per-packet reply timeout in seconds (default 2, range 1..10).

name: traceroute_between
description: Multi-hop path discovery from source_switch_ip to any IP target (SSH 'traceroute -n'). Reveals asymmetric paths, unexpected transits, and ECMP spread. SAFE_READ — sends probes but makes no device-state changes.

source_switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch that will run traceroute (required).

switch_ip.description: Alias for source_switch_ip.

target.description: Destination IPv4/IPv6 address or DNS hostname.

name: get_fabric_reachability_matrix
description: N×N ICMP matrix: for each switch in the inventory, ping every other switch in parallel. Returns a grid ready for colour-coded rendering — gold for spotting partial fabric partitions.

switch_ips.description: Optional subset of mgmt IPs; default = full inventory.

name: get_fabric_mtu_consistency
description: Walk every pair of peered L3 interfaces (BGP adjacencies), compare MTU on both ends, flag mismatches. MTU mismatches silently blackhole large packets — a classic fabric debugging painpoint.

switch_ips.description: Optional subset of mgmt IPs; default = full inventory.

name: drain_switch
description: Administratively shut every configured BGP neighbour on the target switch — maintenance prep. Uses vtysh 'router bgp <asn>' + 'neighbor <ip> shutdown' in one batch. Reversed by undrain_switch. MUTATION + requires confirmation.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch to drain (required).

name: undrain_switch
description: Administratively bring up every configured BGP neighbour on the target switch — reverse of drain_switch. MUTATION + requires confirmation.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch to bring back into service (required).

name: validate_fabric_vs_intent
description: Compare live fabric state against a declarative JSON intent file (default path: config/fabric_intent.json). Reports drift per switch: ASN mismatches, missing/unexpected BGP peers, wrong IP assignments, MTU differences. Missing intent file returns an empty-compliant verdict with an example schema.

intent_path.description: Optional path to the intent JSON; default config/fabric_intent.json.

name: get_fabric_config_diff
description: Compare a whitelist of meaningful CONFIG_DB tables (VLAN, PORTCHANNEL, INTERFACE, BGP_NEIGHBOR, DEVICE_METADATA, …) between two switches. Scoped to avoid runtime noise. Returns per-table lists of keys-only-in-left, keys-only-in-right, and keys present on both sides with differing fields.

tables.description: Optional override of tables to diff; default is the built-in whitelist.

name: iperf_between
description: End-to-end throughput test between two switches using iperf3. Starts a one-shot iperf3 server on the target, runs the client on the source, parses the JSON result. If iperf3 isn't installed, returns a structured install hint rather than erroring.

source_switch_ip.description: Management IP of the switch that will SEND traffic.

switch_ip.description: Alias for source_switch_ip (so NL can auto-fill from global).

target.description: Destination IP or hostname reachable from source.

reverse.description: If true, target sends and source receives.

name: get_routes_by_prefix
description: Search the whole fabric RIB for a given IPv4 prefix. Fans out get_routes across the inventory and filters each switch's route list by exact / covers / covered_by / any match. Answers 'who advertises 10.0.0.0/24?'.

switch_ips.description: Optional subset of switches to query.

name: rollback_mutation
description: Undo a previously-recorded mutation by invoking its inverse with restored inputs. Works for set_interface_admin_status, set_interface_mtu/description, set_ip_interface, add/remove_vlan, add/remove_static_route, set_bgp_neighbor_admin, set_portchannel_member, drain/undrain_switch. Refuses config_save and clear_interface_counters (not reversible).

mutation_id.description: Ledger mutation_id to reverse (find one in get_mutation_history or the Activity view).

name: save_fabric_snapshot
description: Snapshot /etc/sonic/config_db.json from every switch into snapshots/<name>/<switch_ip>.json with a metadata sidecar. SAFE_READ — only reads device config, writes to the server's local filesystem.

name.description: Optional label; must be [A-Za-z0-9_.-]+. Default = ISO timestamp.

note.description: Optional free-text note saved in the metadata.

name: restore_fabric_snapshot
description: DESTRUCTIVE: upload a saved config_db.json from snapshots/<name>/ to each switch and run 'sudo config reload -y'. Tears down the data plane briefly and can lock out management if the snapshot is bad. Always pair with a confirmation click; always have the snapshot tested first.

switch_ips.description: Optional subset; default = all switches in the snapshot.

skip_reload.description: Upload the JSON but don't run 'config reload'. Useful for staging.

name: fabric_drain_rotate
description: Rolling maintenance playbook: for each switch, drain_switch → wait → undrain_switch → wait for BGP to re-establish. Stops at first failure (and does NOT attempt to undrain the failed switch — an operator should investigate manually).

switch_ips.description: Ordered subset to rotate through; default = full inventory.

wait_after_drain_s.description: Soak time after each drain (default 8, range 1..120).

wait_after_undrain_s.description: Time to poll for full reconvergence after undrain (default 20, range 1..300).

name: detect_routing_loop
description: Run traceroute from every source switch to every target (default: the other switches' mgmt IPs). Flags paths where a hop IP repeats — that's a loop or flap. Also reports paths that don't reach the target within max_hops.

targets.description: Explicit targets to probe; default = every other switch's mgmt IP.

switch_ips.description: Sources to probe FROM; default = full inventory.

max_hops.description: Default 6, range 1..30. Keep low for direct-attach fabrics.

name: get_mac_table
description: Forwarding (MAC) table from 'show mac'. Returns {vlan, mac, port, type} rows.

switch_ip.description: Management IP of the SONiC switch (required).

name: get_mac_table_all
description: Parallel fan-out of get_mac_table across the whole inventory.

name: get_arp_table_all
description: Parallel fan-out of get_arp_table across the whole inventory. Sibling of get_arp_table.

name: get_fabric_bandwidth
description: Two-poll interface counter delta across the whole inventory. For each (switch, interface), returns rx_bps / tx_bps and percent utilization when a port speed is known. Shows top-5 by rx and tx for quick saturation diagnosis.

switch_ips.description: Optional subset of mgmt IPs; default = full inventory.

min_bps.description: Drop interfaces whose combined (rx+tx) bps is below this threshold. Default 0 (include all).

name: compare_fabric_snapshots
description: Diff two saved snapshots (created by save_fabric_snapshot). Reports per-switch key-level differences across a scoped set of CONFIG_DB tables — no fabric access needed, pure local filesystem read.

left_name.description: Snapshot label to treat as the 'before' side.

right_name.description: Snapshot label to treat as the 'after' side.

switch_ips.description: Optional subset of switches present in both snapshots; default = intersection.

tables.description: Optional table override; default is the built-in whitelist.
